title: Resource management of subitems

posts.author: BertBeerSelect (Bert Van de Velde)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to propose a resource management overview for subitems. For example, right now we have a big project in which the time of people is the main resource. But the task are subdivided in different objectives. Within each objective different people have different tasks. An overview of their time consumation based on the objective’s timeline would be very helpfull.

posts.author: Teresa.DevSamurai (Teresa Tran)
posts.cookedHtml: Teamboard for Monday.com’s can help with an overview of resource planning. By using subitems, you can track the time allocation and consumption for each team member within different objectives. The workload and timeline views will provide a clear picture of how resources are distributed and managed across your project.
